description.value:
Frequency once per day

You have a particular interest in the inconsistencies of reality and the material universe that you've read about in philosophical texts. You overload a technological foe's logic processes by posing a paradoxical problem to them. The tech creature must have an Intelligence modifier of –3 or higher, and they must understand the language you speak. The creature attempts a @Check[will|against:class-spell|options:inflicts:glitching,inflicts:stupefied] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. Any creature targeted by Logical Paradox becomes immune to it for 24 hours, no matter the result of their saving throw.

Critical Success The creature's logic processes are strong enough to understand your logical paradox, and it has no effect.

Success The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Glitching]{Glitching 1}.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Glitching]{Glitching 2}.

Critical Failure The creature becomes glitching 2 and is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for as long as it remains glitching.
